item.name: User Sign In
Add New Program for Id

exec: pm.execution.setNextRequest("Update Program by ProgramName to get ID");
if(message && message == "cannot create program , since already exists")
console.log("User exists. Jumping to Activation step.");
pm.execution.setNextRequest("Update Program by ProgramName to get ID");

item.name: Update Program by ProgramName to get ID
Add New Program for Name

exec: // pm.execution.setNextRequest("Add New Program with invalid endpoint");
pm.execution.setNextRequest("Update Program by ProgramName for Name");
if(message && message == "cannot create program , since already exists")
console.log("User exists. Jumping to Activation step.");
pm.execution.setNextRequest("Update Program by ProgramName for Name");
